string.text: Inform Beard about the stalkers' fates
Find out about the fate of Craven, Bonehead and Seasoned
Find out about Craven's and Bonehead's fate
Find out about Craven's and Seasoned's fate
Find out about Craven's fate
Find out about Bonehead's and Seasoned's fate
Find out about Bonehead's fate
Find out about Seasoned's fate
Find the "Heart of Oasis" artifact
Give the "Heart of Oasis" artifact to Beard
Meet Turbid
Perhaps Turbid knows what happened to the stalkers.
Find the anomalous plant that's been requested by the scientists and bring it to the mediator.
Anomalous plant: Inspect the area
Anomalous plant: Bring the order to the mediator
Unknown creature: Report to Ilya about being ready
Pick up Fyodor's flash drive from the courier and give it back to Turbid
Pick up Fyodor's flash drive from the courier
Bring the flash drive to Turbid
Message from Turbid: That's it, stalker, I don't need your help anymore.
Pick up Maximilian's package from the bandits.
Give the package to Maximilian
Pick up the package from Kostyan
Get the order from the bandits
Get to the bandit camp
Find the bandit leader
Take the goods
Meet Maximilian
Maximilian may know about the missing stalkers.
Help Maximilian take over the mercenary camp.
Attack on the camp: Wait until the appointed time
Attack on the camp: Kill the mercenaries
Attack on the camp: Report to Maximilian about being prepared
Attack on the camp: Follow Maximilian
Attack on the camp: Talk to Maximilian
Maximilian: Come here, let's talk.
Maximilian left without you.
What are you doing, going out for a walk? We're beginning without you.
Talk to Maximilian
Talk with Radik
Bring food to Radik
At least five food rations.
Acquire a mercenary's PDA
Talk with Radik
A mercenary's PDA is required to infiltrate the base.
Get a mercenary's outfit from the trader
Get a mercenary's outfit from the messenger
Find a mercenary outfit
A mercenary outfit is required to infiltrate the base.
Breakthrough: Accompany Radik's squad
Breakthrough: Set the explosives
Breakthrough: Talk to Radik
Take a position near the mercenaries' base.
Hey, where did you go? Return back to the group.
Free the captives.
Rescue: Infiltrate the mercenary base under the guise of a merc
Rescue: Find the captives
Rescue: Purge the mercenaries
Fyodor died.
Talk with Mishka "Tesla" about the scanner
Misha "Tesla" may help point to the place where Croven may reside.
Get the scanner's missing parts to make it work.
Bring the "Compass" and the microchip technology
Talk with Semyon
Find a "Compass" and a microchip
Get the "Compass" artifact
Find Oleg and take his microchip
Purge the mutants from the teleportation's location.
Clear the area from mutants
Get to the plateau where Craven may currently be at.
The path to the plateau: Report to Misha "Tesla" about being ready
The path to the plateau: Prepare the scanner
The path to the plateau: Wait until Misha "Tesla" sets up the scanner
The path to the plateau: Get to the anomaly
Returning to the plateau: Get back to the anomaly
Search the place and wait until "Tesla" configures the scanner to return back
The path to the plateau: Take the scanner
What an idiot... Now how will you get back?
Where are you going with my scanner?
Hey, where are you going? I won't wait for you!
Hey, my patience is running out! Get back here!
That's it, I've had enough. I'm going back to the base.
I've had enough!
Volodya "Big" may help to take over Semyon "Cowboy"'s base.
Talk with Volodya "Big"
Report to Volodya "Big" about being ready
Maximilian's private box. Closed with a key.
Meet with the stalkers
Report to Grisha about being ready
Eliminate Turbid's squad
Return the tools to the technician.
Tools: Find Gena Non-Understanding
Tools: Find a way to take away Gena's tools
Tools: Inform the technician that Gena has been killed
Tools: Accompany Gena at the agreed upon location
Tools: Bring the tools to the technician
Tools: Get the tools
Tools: Find the box
Tools: Find Gena's note
Tools: Report to Gena about what has happened
Set the charge.
Search the bush.
You dumbass! This is what you led yourself to. And thanks for the loot, I can now safely leave the Zone. So long.
Closed with a key.
A key.
Found in Ilya's pocket.
Found in a dead soldier's pocket.
Find the trader's notebook
Give the notebook to the trader
Homeless man: Help kill off the mutants
Stranger: Help to destroy the mutants
I don't even want to sleep - there are enemies nearby
Help Arthur: Get his friends' flash drives from the anomaly.
Help Arthur: Give the flash drives to Arthur
Help Arthur: Find Vadik's and Romka's flash drives
Help Arthur: Find Vadik's flash drive
Help Arthur: Find Romka's flash drive
Message from the rookie base: We now have a new trader and technician.
Stalker, if you're interested in getting a nice pay, come to the basement - we'll have a chat.
Help the stalkers take the measurements for the scientists.
Measurements: Report about being prepared
Measurements: Accompany stalkers at the measuring location
Measurements: Talk with Andrey
Andrey: Hey, where are you going? Return back to the group.
Andrey: What are you doing, going out for a walk? Return back to the group immediately!
Andrey: That's it, you ran away. You can go on and deal with your own things. You're no longer in our group.
Andrey: Well done. Come here for the reward.
Andrey: Max, you didn't take your pay. I won't wait for you, however. I'll keep the money for the trader called Ivan.
Damn! Andrew died. Returning back to base.
Pick up the artifact ($$ACTION_USE$$)
Return the goods to the merchant: Get to the cave
Return the goods to the merchant: Find the box
Return the goods to the merchant: Give the box back
Turn the radio on ($$ACTION_USE$$)
Turn the radio off ($$ACTION_USE$$)
After a lot of wandering around the Zone, Max decided to leave the perimeter. But before heading back to the Big Land, Max wanted to find a jackpot.
By coincidence, Beard - the famous artifact trader at Zaton, put up a serious order for a valuable anomalous formation, which was called the "Heart of Oasis" by stalkers.

When Beard had collected approximate info on the location of the artifact, he sent three of his friends, whom he trusted on when it came to the most profitable orders. After a while it became clear that the guys had disappeared.
Beard decided to organize a search and ordered Max to find out about the fate of his comrades. The stalker Max traveled with the help of a guide to the Valley of Whispers.
Stalker Max has left the Zone. How his life continued on in the Big Land - no-one knows.
After learning about the fates of his comrades, Beard no longer made close friends with those who worked for him.
Beard never found out what happened to his comrades. But after that he no longer made close friends with those who worked for him.
Under the pressure of the mercenary attacks, Maximilian went to his base and blew up the only bridge that connected the two parts of the valley. After this attack the mercenaries stopped.
After settling down in a new place, Radik conducted "tours" to the local attractions for the newcomer stalkers.
Increasing amounts of scientists began to appear in the valley to study the anomalous fields. They were particularly interested in the local underground anomalies.
Everything remains the same in the rookie base - all is quiet. Among the fresh stalkers the story of Turbid passes on from mouth to mouth, growing with each new tale.
Maximilian: Hey! We agreed to go together. Where did you go?
Maximilian: Where are you? Damn it... Snorks!!! A-a-a-a!!!
Maximilian: Snorks!
Rockefeller: Max, if you want to earn extra money, come to me - I have a job for you.
Ivan "Sausage": We are being attacked by mercenaries!
Talk with Rockefeller
Pick up the explosives from Ivan
Talk with Yasha
Follow Yasha to the cave
Set the explosives
Follow Yasha
Pick up the award from Rockfeller
Hey, where are you going? Get back here immediately!
That's it, we're going to the base.
Hey, are you going out for a walk? Get back to the group.
That's it, you're out of the squad. We'll find someone else.
Find Valery Palich's shotgun
Return the shotgun to Valery Palich
Valery Palich: The detector is ready. You can take it.
The artifact is ready, you can pick up.
Tourist
Take the tourist along a trip through the valley.
The size of the pay depends on the total amount of mutants and hostiles killed by the tourist.
Killed a mutant.
The creature is down.
I shot a mutant.
Minus one creature.
I killed that thing.
Killed an enemy.
Murdered that idiot.
Shot, I shot him.
Eat this.
I killed the bastard.
With me.
In the treasury.
Hey, where are you? Don't go further away.
Alright, let's see.
Died.
Earnings.
He said that he won't go with you anymore.
Mutants killed:
Hostiles killed:
Anomalies visited:
I'm happy.
I'm satisfied.
That was a bad hunt.
I'm disappointed.
Total
Tourists: Wait a minute, we'll take a look at this anomaly.
Wow, what a great place!
Such a nice place!
Wow! I haven't seen such a thing before.
Beautiful.
Tourists: We can move on.
You can put an end to your guide career.
Maximilian: Max, I see you here - go to me, need to talk.
